title: Headset version is changed
scenario: Firmware update version not reflected on Lens tenant inventory, Device profile, and Device user pages after DFU via mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure the headset is connected and registered to a Lens tenant.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update.
4. Initiate a firmware update (DFU) on the headset via the app.
5. Wait for the firmware update to complete successfully.
6. Note the new firmware version displayed on the headset's Device Settings page in the app.
7. Log in to the Lens tenant's web portal.
8. Navigate to the Inventory page and verify the headset's firmware version matches the version noted in step 6.
9. Navigate to the Device profile page for the headset and verify the firmware version is correctly reflected.
10. Navigate to the Device user / Mobile user page for the associated user and verify the firmware version is correctly reflected.
expected: The new headset firmware version is correctly displayed on the Lens tenant's Inventory page, Device profile page, and Device user/Mobile user page, matching the version shown in the Poly Studio Mobile app after the DFU.
